# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you've found a security issue in `react-is-online-context`, please report it privately:

➔ https://github.com/lacymorrow/react-is-online-context/security/advisories/new

Or email **lacy@lacymorrow.com** with `[react-is-online-context security]` in the subject.

Expect an acknowledgement within 72 hours.

## Supported versions

Only the latest published version on npm receives security updates.

## Scope

In scope:
- The published `react-is-online-context` npm package
- Context provider, hook contract, error boundary

Out of scope:
- Issues in [is-online](https://github.com/sindresorhus/is-online) — report upstream
- React framework issues — report to facebook/react
